% !TEX TS-program = lualatex

% ------------------------------------------- %

% ------------------------------------------- %

\documentclass{standalone}

\usepackage[svgnames]{xcolor}
\usepackage[3d]{luadraw}

\directlua{
  dofile('../../../..//products/lua/palapi.lua')

  dofile('../../../../products/lua/palettes-hf/Wistia.lua')
}

\begin{document}
\begin{luadraw}{name = Wistia-palette}
local PAL = palWistia

local WIDTH = 10

local PALSIZE  = #PAL
local PALDIM   = .6
local PALDELTA = .1

local g = graph:new{
  window = {-WIDTH - 5, WIDTH + 5, -5, 4.4},
  bbox   = false
}

g:Linewidth(2)

local A = Z(-WIDTH, 4)
local v = Z(0, -PALDIM)

for k = 1, PALSIZE do
  local color = rgb(PAL[k])

  g:Drectangle(
    A, A + PALDIM, A + PALDIM + v,
    "color = black, fill = " .. color
  )

  g:Dlabel(
    "\\footnotesize$" .. k .. "$",
    A + Z(PALDIM, .85*PALDIM) / 2,
    {
      pos          = "S",
      node_options = "inner sep = 0pt, outer ysep = 0.5pt"
    }
  )

  A = A + PALDIM + PALDELTA

  if k % 10 == 0 then
    A = A + Z(-10*(PALDIM + PALDELTA), -2*PALDIM)
  end
end

g:Show()
\end{luadraw}
\end{document}
